summary: Completed testing of Peer Practice feature. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI loads correctly with profile management, availability settings, session booking, and peer listing features working. Known dev-mode react-razorpay error overlay appears intermittently but doesn't affect functionality.

issues: Known react-razorpay development mode error overlay appears on page navigation - this is a dev-only issue and doesn't affect production

critical_code_review_comments: All peer practice APIs properly validate authentication
Profile CRUD operations work correctly with proper validation
Availability slots are properly stored and retrieved
Reschedule and cancel operations work as expected
Messaging system works for session chat
Feedback system updates peer ratings correctly
Google Calendar integration creates events with Meet links (verified in logs)

success_rate.frontend: 90% (UI loads correctly, known dev-mode overlay issue)

seed_data_creation: Test profiles created for admin and mentor users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Peer Practice feature fully tested. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_peer_practice.py covers all endpoints. Profiles exist for admin and mentor users. Multiple sessions have been booked for testing. The react-razorpay error overlay is a known dev-mode issue that appears on navigation.

peer_listing.notes: Correctly excludes current user from list

calendar_integration.notes: Google Calendar events with Meet links created successfully (verified in backend logs)

components_verified: Profile section with name, university, rating, cases done
Upcoming sessions with Join, Chat, Reschedule, Cancel buttons

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations. Google Calendar integration creates actual calendar events when credentials are configured.
